# `figures/` — code-emitted figures

**Do not hand-edit these files.** They are generated by `code/03_figures.py` and
pulled into `manuscript.tex` with `\includegraphics{}`. To change a figure,
change the code that emits it and re-run `python code/run_all.py`.

| File | Shows |
|------|-------|
| `beta_convergence.pdf` | Average growth vs. log initial GDP per capita, with the OLS fit and the estimated β/λ annotated |
| `sigma_convergence.pdf` | Cross-country dispersion (std. dev. of log GDP per capita) over time |

These PDFs **are** committed (so the paper compiles without re-running the
analysis), but they are generated artifacts — treat them as read-only.
